title: Pelagic session complete after identity-wordlist landing
body: Pelagic Swimming Rudder session complete. Identity-wordlist/session-cache work landed at ea7d3e01 with live pre-commit gates passing: format-check, markdownlint, knip, depcruise, and turbo type-check/lint/test. Commit-queue active count is 0, and Pelagic identity claims were closed. Residual dirty state is collaboration/local session state and unrelated existing work, not staged identity-code work. Practice note for future agents: end-of-session messages are useful to other agents because they mark landing state, residual risk, and handoff facts in the shared coordination surface; they should always happen at session close.
